channel.title: VL Capital Management on VL Capital Management — Liquidity for Creditors
channel.description: Recent content in VL Capital Management on VL Capital Management — Liquidity for Creditors

item.title: Creditor liquidity: turning frozen claims into capital
item.description: When platforms freeze withdrawals, creditors face years of uncertainty. A liquid secondary market for claims can change that.

item.title: What goes into a fair claim valuation
item.description: Pricing a distressed claim is part art, part science. Here’s how we arrive at a transparent, fair offer.

item.title: About VL Capital
item.description: VL Capital Management is a specialist liquidity provider. When exchanges, lenders, or other platforms freeze withdrawals or enter insolvency, creditors can face years of uncertainty before seeing any recovery. We change that by buying creditor claims at a fair, transparent price — giving claimants immediate capital and absorbing the risk and timeline of the estate’s outcome ourselves.

item.title: CoinLoan
item.description: Amid CoinLoan’s restructuring, we offered creditors a path to immediate liquidity by acquiring their claims.

item.title: FTX
item.description: Following the collapse of FTX, we provided immediate liquidity to creditors holding claims against the estate.

item.title: Haru Invest
item.description: When Haru Invest suspended withdrawals, we purchased creditor claims and supplied liquidity to affected investors.

item.title: Legal & Disclosures
item.description:
Important information

The information on this website is provided for general informational purposes only and does not constitute investment advice, an offer, or a solicitation to buy or sell any security or financial instrument.

No investment advice

Nothing on this site should be construed as a recommendation. Any decision to invest should be made only after consulting your own professional advisers and considering your individual circumstances.

Past performance

Past performance is not indicative of future results. The value of investments and the income from them can go down as well as up, and investors may not get back the amount originally invested.

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description:
Overview

This Privacy Policy explains how VL Capital Management (“we”, “us”) collects, uses, and safeguards information you provide through this website.

Information we collect

  • Contact details you submit through our forms (such as name and email).
  • Usage data collected automatically, such as pages visited and general analytics.

How we use information

  • To respond to your enquiries and provide our services.
  • To improve our website and understand how it is used.
  • To comply with legal and regulatory obligations.

Sharing

We do not sell your personal information. We may share it with service providers who support our operations, subject to appropriate safeguards.
